message:
refactor(abi): migrate SysV IPC functions to native syscalls

Adds 11 new syscall wrappers for System V IPC:
- sys_shmget, sys_shmctl, sys_shmat, sys_shmdt
- sys_semget, sys_semctl, sys_semop
- sys_msgget, sys_msgctl, sys_msgsnd, sys_msgrcv

Migrates 11 libc::syscall calls to native wrappers (182 → 171).
Preserves membrane policy logic throughout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
